rule_text_short: Do Not Post Featured Thread Content
No Images and Vines Without Exceptions
No Social Media Requests for Upvotes
Limitations on Questions Concerning Historical Artifacts and Items
Do not just post links or quotations
Directly link to published peer-reviewed research articles or a brief media summ
No summaries of summaries, reviews or popular reposts (over 100 upvotes).
Research must be less than 6 months old.
No sensationalized titles, all titles must include the model where applicable.
All submissions must be flaired and contain a link to the published article, eit
Non-professional personal anecdotes may be removed.
Arguments dismissing established scientific theories must contain substantial, p
This sub is about helping people in need
Ages, genders and relationship length required!
No questions directed at a single gender.
Do not request personal info, including pics.
Do not encourage violence or criminal behavior, even as a joke.
Do not mention upvotes or downvotes. We do not allow vote manipulation.
Creative writing projects and trolls are not welcome.
Most importantly, abuse, bigotry, misogyny, misandry, racism, homophobia, gender
